## Summary

- what changed
- why it changed

## Validation

- [ ] `uv run pytest`
- [ ] `uv run poe lint`
- [ ] `uv run poe type-check`
- [ ] `uv run zensical build --strict` (if docs or theme files changed)

## Docs impact

- [ ] No docs changes needed
- [ ] Docs updated in `docs/`
- [ ] README updated

## Notes for reviewers

Anything that deserves extra attention goes here.
